name: Proof Theory — Cut Elimination
description: Hauptsatz (Gentzen): every LK-proof has cut-free proof. Subformula property: cut-free proof uses only subformulas of end-sequent. Consistency follows.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Cut-free proof\nno cut rule"]
    D2["Def: Subformula\nof formula"]
    T1["Thm: Hauptsatz\ncut eliminable"]
    T2["Thm: Subformula prop\ncut-free uses subformulas"]
    T3["Thm: Consistency\nnot ⊢ ⊥"]
    T1 --> D1
    T1 --> T2
    D2 --> T2
    T2 --> T3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2 definition
    class T1,T2,T3 theorem
